final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: UI/UX design system
Asset type: web dashboard, mobile app interface, component library
Primary request: comprehensive UI design system with dashboard, mobile screens, cards, buttons, and controls
Scene/backdrop: clean workspace environment with subtle gradient backgrounds, modular grid layouts
Subject: sleek dashboard interface with data visualization widgets, responsive mobile screens, card components, button states, form controls
Style/medium: minimalist tech design, glassmorphism accents, modern flat design with subtle depth
Composition/framing: multi-view layout showing desktop dashboard (main), mobile interface (secondary), and component details, organized grid system
Lighting/mood: soft ambient glow, subtle highlights on interactive elements, clean and futuristic atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy blue + electric cyan + cool white + subtle purple accents, high contrast
Materials/textures: matte surfaces with glass-like transparency, subtle noise texture, smooth gradients
Constraints: maintain consistent spacing and alignment across all components, ensure visual hierarchy is clear
Avoid: cluttered layouts, excessive shadows, skeuomorphic textures, rainbow gradients, low contrast text
